ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-31-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-15-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUACH, TOMMY S $2,318.62 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,498.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-31-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
